feed.title: Docket updates for Dennis v. Tesla Inc, 3:25-cv-06052
feed.rights: Created for the public domain by Free Law Project

entry.title: Entry #18 in Dennis v. Tesla Inc, 3:25-cv-06052
entry.summary: MINUTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL AND PRETRIAL DATES - *TWELVE DAY* Jury Trial is set for 10/25/2027 at 9:00 AM in Courtroom B before U.S. District Judge David G. Estudillo. Joinder of Parties due by 6/1/2026, Amended Pleadings due by 6/8/2026, Expert Witness Disclosure/Reports under FRCP 26(a)(2) due by 1/11/2027, Rebuttal Expert Disclosure/Reports due by 2/25/2027, Motions due by 5/28/2027, Discovery completed by 6/2/2027, Dispositive motions due by 6/28/2027, Motions in Limine due by 9/20/2027, Pretrial Order due by 10/4/2027, Voir dire/jury instructions/trial briefs due by 10/4/2027, Agreed Neutral Statement of the Case due by 10/4/2027, Deposition Designations due by 10/4/2027, Pretrial Conference set for 10/15/2027 at 1:30 PM in Courtroom B before U.S. District Judge David G. Estudillo. (MGC)

entry.title: Minute entry from 2026-03-27 in Dennis v. Tesla Inc, 3:25-cv-06052
entry.summary: Scheduling Conference

entry.title: Entry #17 in Dennis v. Tesla Inc, 3:25-cv-06052
entry.summary: MINUTE ENTRY for proceedings held before U.S. District Judge David G. Estudillo- Dep Clerk: Gretchen Craft; Pla Counsel: Celia Rivera, Donald Slavik, Peggy Underbrink; Def Counsel: Kit Roth, Patricia Eakes; CR: Angela Nicolavo; Time of Hearing: 9:30; Courtroom: Zoom; Scheduling Conference held on 3/27/2026. Court addresses consent to a Magistrate Judge. Court outlines expectations of parties re professionalism, rules, and deadlines, including the Court's discovery dispute procedure. Trial is set for 10/25/2027; scheduling order will issue. Expanded discovery discussed/ruled on. (MGC)

entry.title: Entry #16 in Dennis v. Tesla Inc, 3:25-cv-06052
entry.summary: JOINT STATUS REPORT signed by all parties. Estimated Trial Days: 8-12. (Roth, Kit)

entry.title: Minute entry from 2026-03-19 in Dennis v. Tesla Inc, 3:25-cv-06052
entry.summary: Notice of Rescheduled Hearing

entry.title: Minute entry from 2026-03-19 in Dennis v. Tesla Inc, 3:25-cv-06052
entry.summary: NOTICE OF RESCHEDULED HEARING *Time: Scheduling Conference is reset for 3/27/2026 at *9:30 AM in Courtroom B via Zoom before U.S. District Judge David G. Estudillo. (MGC)

entry.title: Entry #15 in Dennis v. Tesla Inc, 3:25-cv-06052
entry.summary: NOTICE of Service of Pltfs Initial Disclosures ; filed by All Plaintiffs. (Slavik, Donald)

entry.title: Entry #14 in Dennis v. Tesla Inc, 3:25-cv-06052
entry.summary: ANSWER to [12] Amended Complaint For Damages by Tesla Inc.(Roth, Kit)

entry.title: Entry #13 in Dennis v. Tesla Inc, 3:25-cv-06052
entry.summary: ORDER DENYING AS MOOT DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO DISMISS (DKT. NO. [11]). Defendant may, at its discretion, file a new motion to dismiss based on the amended complaint. Signed by U.S. District Judge David G Estudillo.(MW)

entry.title: Entry #12 in Dennis v. Tesla Inc, 3:25-cv-06052
entry.summary: AMENDED COMPLAINT FOR DAMAGES against defendant(s) Tesla Inc with JURY DEMAND filed by Jeffery L Dennis, Renee Canavan.(Underbrink, Peggy)

entry.title: Entry #11 in Dennis v. Tesla Inc, 3:25-cv-06052
entry.summary: MOTION to Dismiss Punitive Damages, filed by Defendant Tesla Inc. Oral Argument Requested. (Attachments: # (1) Proposed Order) Noting Date 1/26/2026, (Roth, Kit)

entry.title: Entry #10 in Dennis v. Tesla Inc, 3:25-cv-06052
entry.summary: NOTICE of Appearance by attorney Donald H Slavik on behalf of Plaintiffs Renee Canavan, Jeffery L Dennis. (Slavik, Donald)

entry.title: Entry #9 in Dennis v. Tesla Inc, 3:25-cv-06052
entry.summary: ORDER REGARDING INITIAL DISCLOSURES, JOINT STATUS REPORT, DISCOVERY, DEPOSITIONS AND EARLY SETTLEMENT: FRCP 26(f) Conference Deadline is 3/5/2026, Initial Disclosure Deadline is 3/12/2026, Joint Status Report due by 3/19/2026, Scheduling Conference set for 3/27/2026 at 2:30 PM in Courtroom B via Zoom before U.S. District Judge David G. Estudillo. Signed by U.S. District Judge David G. Estudillo. (MGC)

entry.summary: ORDER granting Parties' [7] Stipulated Motion Regarding Deadline to Respond to Complaint. Signed by U.S. District Judge David G Estudillo.(MW)
